topicTitle: Man and Medicine: Towards Health for All

images.alt: Chronological visual roadmap of medical history showing evolution from primitive beliefs to modern SDG-driven health revolution
images.purpose: To provide a clear, chronological visual roadmap of medical history. Memorizing historical milestones is much easier when students can visually sequence the eras—from primitive beliefs and ancient systems to the modern SDG-driven health revolution.

topicTitle: Concept of Health and Disease

images.alt: The Iceberg Phenomenon of Disease showing apparent clinical cases above the waterline and hidden subclinical disease below
images.purpose: Visual metaphor clarifying the difference between apparent clinical cases and the hidden mass of subclinical disease.

images.alt: Levels of Prevention and Modes of Intervention mapped against the stages of disease progression
images.purpose: Visually maps the chronological stages of a disease against the appropriate public health interventions.
images.anchorText: Levels of Prevention & Modes of Intervention

topicTitle: Epidemiological Methods, Descriptive Epidemiology, and Disease Fluctuations

images.alt: Hierarchy of Epidemiological Evidence showing study designs from weakest to strongest
images.purpose: Helps students visualize the gold standard of clinical relevance and memorize the exact order of study designs.

topicTitle: Immunization, Cold Chain, National Immunization Schedule, and AEFI

images.alt: Vaccine Vial Monitor stages showing color changes from usable to discard point
images.purpose: Practical guide on how healthcare workers read heat-sensitive vaccine labels.

topicTitle: Screening for Disease

images.alt: Shifting Cut-offs showing the trade-off between Sensitivity and Specificity
images.purpose: Visually explains the mathematical trade-off between Sensitivity and Specificity.

topicTitle: Non Communicable Diseases

images.alt: The Rule of Halves for Hypertension showing the steep drop-off in diagnosis treatment and control
images.purpose: Visually depicts the steep drop-off in the diagnosis, treatment, and control of hypertension in the general population.

topicTitle: RMNCAH+N (Reproductive, Maternal, Newborn, Child, Adolescent Health and Nutrition)

images.alt: LaQshya labour room quality improvement programme logo
images.purpose: Visual cue for the LaQshya quality certification initiative under maternal health services.
images.anchorText: LAQSHYA - LABOR ROOM QUALITY IMPROVEMENT GUIDELINE

images.alt: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana logo
images.purpose: Helps learners quickly associate the PMMVY cash benefit scheme with its official logo.

images.alt: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan logo
images.purpose: Adds a recognizable visual marker for PMSMA near the antenatal care initiative section.

images.alt: Surakshit Matritva Aashwasan SUMAN scheme logo
images.purpose: Reinforces recall of the SUMAN maternal and newborn care entitlement scheme.

images.alt: Mothers' Absolute Affection programme logo
images.purpose: Places the MAA breastfeeding promotion icon directly beside its programme description.

images.alt: Indian Newborn Action Plan logo
images.purpose: Provides a quick visual hook for the newborn survival action plan section.

images.alt: Rashtriya Kishor Swasthya Karyakram logo
images.purpose: Visually anchors the adolescent health programme under the RMNCAH+N umbrella.

topicTitle: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme (NVBDCP)

images.alt: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme logo
images.purpose: Shows the official NVBDCP identity near the programme introduction for easier recall.
images.anchorText: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme (NVBDCP)

topicTitle: National Leprosy Eradication Programme (NLEP)

images.alt: National Leprosy Eradication Programme graphic
images.purpose: Adds the NLEP programme visual near the opening section on leprosy control in India.

topicTitle: National Tuberculosis Elimination Programme (NTEP)

images.alt: RNTCP DOTS logo
images.purpose: Highlights the older RNTCP era and DOTS strategy at the point where the programme evolution is introduced.

images.alt: National Tuberculosis Elimination Programme logo
images.purpose: Places the current NTEP emblem beside the modern renamed TB control programme section.

topicTitle: National AIDS Control Programme (NACP)

images.alt: National AIDS Control Organization logo
images.purpose: Adds the NACO identifier near the programme introduction for immediate visual recognition.

topicTitle: National Programme for Control of Blindness and Visual Impairment (NPCB&VI)

images.alt: National Programme for Control of Blindness and Visual Impairment logo
images.purpose: Provides an official visual marker for the NPCB&VI section.
images.anchorText: National Programme for Control of Blindness and Visual Impairment (NPCB&VI)

topicTitle: Demography Basics and Demographic Trends

images.alt: The Demographic Cycle showing 5 stages of birth rate and death rate changes over economic development
images.purpose: Line graph showing the crucial relationship and resulting gap between birth rates and death rates over the 5 stages.

images.alt: Population Pyramids comparison showing expansive stationary and constrictive age-sex structures
images.purpose: Visually compares the age-sex structures of different populations so students can interpret population growth trends.

topicTitle: Under-5 Clinic, Congenital Disorders, and Battered Baby Syndrome

images.alt: The Under-5 Clinic Logo showing the structural components and which triangle represents which service
images.purpose: Visually embeds the exact structural components of the Under-5 clinic logo.

topicTitle: Behavioral Problems, Juvenile Delinquency, Child Rights, and APGAR Score

images.alt: APGAR Score Visual Mnemonic Table showing 0 1 and 2 point criteria for each parameter
images.purpose: Quick-reference visual mnemonic for the APGAR scoring system.

topicTitle: National Programme for Prevention & Control of Non-Communicable Diseases (NP-NCD)

images.alt: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Non-Communicable Diseases logo
images.purpose: Places the NP-NCD visual identity next to the updated programme rename and overview.

topicTitle: National Mental Health Programme (NMHP)

images.alt: National Mental Health Programme logo
images.purpose: Introduces the NMHP section with its programme branding for better recognition.

topicTitle: Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme (IDSP)

images.alt: Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme logo
images.purpose: Adds the IDSP logo beside the surveillance system introduction and IHIP transition notes.

topicTitle: Ayushman Bharat Programme (AB-PMJAY & Health and Wellness Centres)

images.alt: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana logo
images.purpose: Places the PM-JAY branding right where the Ayushman Bharat programme components are introduced.
images.anchorText: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)

topicTitle: Health Care of the Community

images.alt: Healthcare Infrastructure Pyramid showing 3-tier rural healthcare system and population norms
images.purpose: Visually maps the 3-tier rural healthcare system and its specific population coverage norms.

topicTitle: Malnutrition, Nutritional Rehabilitation Centres, Hidden Hunger and GHI

images.alt: Severe Acute Malnutrition comparison showing Kwashiorkor versus Marasmus clinical features
images.purpose: Classic high-yield visual comparison to distinguish the clinical signs of protein deficiency versus energy deficiency.

topicTitle: Psychology, Behavior, and Learning

images.alt: Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs pyramid showing deficiency and growth needs
images.purpose: Visual structured mnemonic for the psychological drivers of human behavior categorized by deficiency vs growth needs.
images.anchorText: MOTIVATION AND MASLOW'S HIERARCHY OF NEEDS

topicTitle: Sustainable Development Goals

images.alt: Key SDG 3 Health Targets showing the most critical 2030 targets
images.purpose: Synthesizes dense text and statistics into a quick-reference hub of the most critical 2030 targets.

topicTitle: Environment and Health: Water Purification & Quality

images.alt: Anatomy of a Slow Sand Filter showing layers and the Schmutzdecke vital layer
images.purpose: Visualizes the layers of a sand filter highlighting the location of the Schmutzdecke.

topicTitle: Entomology: Mosquitoes & Control

images.alt: Mosquito Resting Postures and Larval Positions for identifying different mosquito vectors
images.purpose: Essential entomology visual for identifying mosquito vectors based on their physical posture.

topicTitle: Hospital Waste Management

images.alt: Biomedical Waste Color Coding showing the 4-bin segregation system
images.purpose: Instant visual reference for the 4-bin segregation system for biomedical waste.
images.anchorText: BIOMEDICAL WASTE CATEGORIES AND SEGREGATION (2016 GUIDELINES)

topicTitle: Disaster Management

images.alt: Disaster Triage Color Tags showing the four triage categories used in mass casualty incidents
images.purpose: Visually anchors the four triage categories used in mass casualty incidents.

topicTitle: Chemical, Biological, Mechanical, Psychosocial Hazards, and Pneumoconioses

images.alt: Pneumoconiosis comparison showing Silicosis versus Asbestosis with affected lung zones and X-ray appearances
images.purpose: Visually contrasts the two most frequently tested occupational lung diseases.

topicTitle: Z-Score, Normal Distribution Curve, and Skewness

images.alt: The Normal Distribution Gaussian Curve with the 68-95-99.7 Rule showing standard deviations and population percentages
images.purpose: Demystifies the mathematical properties of the Gaussian curve by visually mapping the standard deviations.

images.alt: Skewness of Central Tendency showing the relationship between Mean Median and Mode in positively and negatively skewed data
images.purpose: Helps students memorize the relationship between Mean, Median, and Mode in skewed data.

topicTitle: Public Health Management Sciences, Organization of Health Services, Health Management Functions and Resources in Health

images.alt: ABC and VED Matrix for Inventory Control combining cost-based and criticality-based techniques
images.purpose: Visually combines ABC and VED inventory control techniques into a single 3x3 matrix.
